FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct RatingControlTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Computed template settings for the RatingControl (the typed-record convention -- see PersonPicture.PersonPictureTemplateSettings / Expander.ExpanderTemplateSettings): the resolved display value (the rating shown right now -- pointer-over preview, else committed value, else placeholder), the foreground/background brushes for the current visual state, and the partial-star clip width baked for the foreground "Set" layer. Mirrors the geometry WinUI's RatingControl::UpdateRatingItemsAppearance derives each pass and binds into its two clipped stack panels. Pure factory: no signals are read here -- the caller passes the already-resolved inputs, so this struct is cheap to build per render and never allocates in a hot bind.

The star foreground recolor is INSTANT, never eased: WinUI drives every star visual state with VisualStateManager::GoToState(useTransitions:false) (see UpdateRatingItemsAppearance), so the brush steps the instant the pointer-over preview resolves. We honor that by computing the resting Foreground directly from the sweep and leaving the glyph's HoverColor at default (A==0 ⇒ the recorder leaves the color untouched and runs no hover ramp) -- a granular re-render swaps the resting color in one step, no cross-fade.

public readonly record struct RatingControlTemplateSettings : IEquatable<RatingControlTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<RatingControlTemplateSettings>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()

object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

RatingControlTemplateSettings(float, ColorF, ColorF)

Computed template settings for the RatingControl (the typed-record convention -- see PersonPicture.PersonPictureTemplateSettings / Expander.ExpanderTemplateSettings): the resolved display value (the rating shown right now -- pointer-over preview, else committed value, else placeholder), the foreground/background brushes for the current visual state, and the partial-star clip width baked for the foreground "Set" layer. Mirrors the geometry WinUI's RatingControl::UpdateRatingItemsAppearance derives each pass and binds into its two clipped stack panels. Pure factory: no signals are read here -- the caller passes the already-resolved inputs, so this struct is cheap to build per render and never allocates in a hot bind.

The star foreground recolor is INSTANT, never eased: WinUI drives every star visual state with VisualStateManager::GoToState(useTransitions:false) (see UpdateRatingItemsAppearance), so the brush steps the instant the pointer-over preview resolves. We honor that by computing the resting Foreground directly from the sweep and leaving the glyph's HoverColor at default (A==0 ⇒ the recorder leaves the color untouched and runs no hover ramp) -- a granular re-render swaps the resting color in one step, no cross-fade.

Foreground ColorF
Background ColorF

Methods

For(float, float, float, int, bool, bool) 

public static RatingControlTemplateSettings For(float value, float placeholder, float preview, int max, bool isEnabled, bool readOnly)

Parameters

value float

Committed rating, or NoValueSet (-1) when unset.

placeholder float

Placeholder rating, or -1 for none.

preview float

Pointer-over preview value, or -1 when not hovering/interacting.

max int
isEnabled bool
readOnly bool

Returns

RatingControlTemplateSettings

StarCenter(int, float, float)

Star center in panel-local on-screen px (RatingControl::CalculateStarCenter, RatingControl.cpp:926-932): ActualRatingFontSize·(index+0.5) + index·ItemSpacing, with ActualRatingFontSize = 32/2 = 16 (cpp:51-54).

public static float StarCenter(int index, float starSize, float itemSpacing)

Parameters

index int
starSize float
itemSpacing float

Returns

float

StarScale(float, float)

Mouse-scalar convenience overload (the pre-touch-damping signature, kept for source compat).

public static float StarScale(float starCenterX, float focalX)

Parameters

starCenterX float
focalX float

Returns

float

StarScale(float, float, float)

The re-based per-star scale at starCenterX given the live focalX (both panel-local on-screen px) and the device pointerScalar (MouseOverScale / TouchOverScale). 1.0 = resting (our 16px glyph); focal peak 1.6 (mouse) or 2.0 (touch).

public static float StarScale(float starCenterX, float focalX, float pointerScalar)

Parameters

starCenterX float
focalX float
pointerScalar float

Returns

float
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
